heading: Increase in capital stock of Corporation; subscription to additional shares
label: 282i Increase in capital stock of Corporation; subscription to additional shares

children.text: to vote for an increase of five hundred and forty thousand shares in the authorized capital stock of the Corporation; and

if such increase becomes effective, to subscribe on behalf of the United States to one hundred and eleven thousand four hundred and ninety-three additional shares of the capital stock of the Corporation: , That any commitment to make payment for such additional subscriptions shall be made subject to obtaining the necessary appropriations.Provided, however

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the increase in the United States subscription to the Corporation provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $111,493,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
